---
title: "Quiet as the Forest · Areas"
listing:
  contents: "../areas/*-en.{qmd,md}"
  sort: "date desc"
  
  # --- 核心修改 ---
  type: default
  image-align: right    # 图片放在右边 (像 Medium/微信公众号列表)
  image-height: "150px" # 强制限制图片高度，防止长图破坏排版
  categories: true
  # 显示阅读时间，增加博客感
  fields: [image, date, title, description, reading-time, categories] 
  # ----------------
  
page-layout: full
---

Areas (English): translated notes about long-term areas of focus. Place `-en` files in `../areas/`.
